label: Prehistory
description: From the invention of writing in Mesopotamia and Egypt through the rise of the earliest urban civilizations and the first great riverine empires.

label: Ancient
description: The age of Persia, Greece, Rome, Han China, and Mauryan India — literate empires trading and warring across three continents.

label: Classical
description: The rise of Islam, Tang and Song China, the Byzantine world, the Maya, and post-Roman Europe — a half-millennium of new orders.

label: Post-classical
description: Mongol steppe empires, Islamic caliphates, the High Middle Ages in Europe, the Mali and Songhai empires, and the Aztec and Inca ascendancies.

label: Early Modern
description: Global exchange, gunpowder empires, Reformation and scientific revolution, Atlantic slavery, and the beginnings of the modern state.

label: Long 19th Century
description: Industry, nationalism, empire, revolution — from Napoleon through the eve of the First World War.

label: 20th Century
description: World wars, decolonisation, the Cold War, mass media, space flight, and the collapse of the Soviet order.

label: Contemporary
description: The internet age, globalisation, climate change, and the shifting balance of a multipolar world.
